activities.name: Trails, trolls, and Tralmon
activities.description: Great morning with maybe 15 “Expect Delay”-ers on the flank of Tiger Mountain, and then down to coffee and salmon viewing, after a visit to Jakob Two Trees, the troll. Gotta love Issaquah

activities.name: Saving something for this afternoon with Steve
activities.description: I had forgotten that we had a plan!

activities.name: Beautiful Seahurst Park with Steve
activities.description: The video is from our post-run drive home with the top down!

activities.name: Flat / Hills / Flat
activities.description: Many stops

activities.name: Meeting Herve at Herkimer
activities.description: Sluggish, but the mid-run coffee definitely helped. Or was it the irrepressible Frenchman?

activities.name: Great to meet you Ken!
activities.description: And thanks for the intro [strava://athletes/4970596/14]David Anderson.

activities.name: Big group x long run!
activities.description: Great morning in the Arboretum and Interlaken

activities.name: Walk with Jay and Liza + neighbors + dogs

activities.name: Lake and Ravenna Hills with Lauren
activities.description: Feeling sluggish. Thanks for getting me out there Lauren!

activities.name: Calibration tango
activities.description: Started easy and did what I needed to

activities.name: Dayton with Tam
activities.description: In the gentle rain

activities.name: Messing with the “race an activity” feature on my watch
activities.description: Doesn’t seem to be working too well, but it’s certainly a motivator.

activities.name: Start of Snake2Lake
activities.description: I left the through-runners at Rattlesnake Ledge, and will meet them 10.5 miles in.

activities.name: 2nd Breakfast, then the last 15 miles of Snake2Lake
activities.description: With Herve, Monica, Tim, Mintu, Anita, and a great visit from Mary, Mattias, and Hans! As well as Fred and the Burnside Labs!

activities.name: Tim says motion is lotion. I guess he’s right
activities.description: Felt pretty decent after 1/2 mile, then fell into “old man intervals”; progressively shorter distances at slightly greater speeds, with 30s walk in between

activities.name: Teaching Lauren to do “old person’s intervals”
activities.description: Lots of walking stops along the way

activities.name: Farther up Wagner Creek
activities.description: 1000’ of elevation gain is pretty nice

Solid six with Anita, Mintu & Herve
activities.description: On a sunny, chilly, morn.

activities.name: Short and unpleasant
